Title: Verification Webhook
Content:
Set the URL for the “Account Verification” webhook under the Developer Settings in your Dashboard. When there are updates on your sub-accounts’ verification status, we will send the data to the URL you have set.

POST https://yourcompany.com/account_verification_webhook_url

Response Schema

Headers

Field Name

Data Type

Description

x-callback-token

string

Your Xendit unique webhook token to verify the origin of the webhook

webhook-id

string

A unique identifier of every webhook to help you to handle double webhooks by implementing idempotency. When you receive the same webhook-id twice, treat the subsequent request as duplicate and reject the webhook accordingly to prevent double webhooks

Body

Field Name

Data Type

Description

status

string

Status of the KYC verification. Available values: PASSED, AWAITING_RESUBMISSION, FAILED

kyc_passed_at

string

The timestamp of when the KYC status changed to PASSED in ISO format

verified_at

string

Timestamp of the verification in ISO format

requested_at

string

Timestamp of the KYC verification requested date in ISO format

failure_reasons

array

An array of objects containing one or more failure reasons:

  • field (string, optional)

  • reason (string)

  • message (string)

Sample Webhook Response

Verification Passed

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "PASSED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "kyc_passed_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       }
   }
}

Resubmission Requested

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "AWAITING_RESUBMISSION",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "field": "authorized_person_selfie_document",
                   "reason": "BLURRY_IMAGE",
                   "message": "The selfie is too blurry"
               },
               {
                   "field": "business_registration_documents[0]",
                   "reason": "WRONG_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "Invalid registration document"
               },
               {
                   "field": "stakeholders[0].identification[1]",
                   "reason": "EXPIRED_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "The passport has expired"
               }

           ]
       }
   }
}

Verification Failed

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "FAILED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "reason": "FAILED_LDD",
                   "message": "Some documents are invalid or do not meet our requirements"
       	       }
           ]
       }
   }
}

Title: Webhook Verifikasi
Content:
Atur URL untuk webhook “Verifikasi Akun” di bawah Pengaturan Developer di Dashboard Anda. Ketika ada pembaruan pada status verifikasi sub-akun Anda, kami akan mengirimkan data ke URL yang telah Anda atur.

POST https://yourcompany.com/account_verification_webhook_url

Skema Respons

Header

Nama Field

Tipe Data

Deskripsi

x-callback-token

string

Token webhook unik Xendit Anda untuk memverifikasi asal webhook

webhook-id

string

Pengidentifikasi unik dari setiap webhook untuk membantu Anda menangani webhook ganda dengan menerapkan idempotensi. Ketika Anda menerima webhook-id yang sama dua kali, perlakukan permintaan berikutnya sebagai duplikat dan tolak webhook tersebut untuk mencegah webhook ganda

Body

Nama Field

Tipe Data

Deskripsi

status

string

Status verifikasi KYC. Nilai yang tersedia: PASSED, AWAITING_RESUBMISSION, FAILED

kyc_passed_at

string

Timestamp saat status KYC berubah menjadi PASSED dalam format ISO

verified_at

string

Timestamp verifikasi dalam format ISO

requested_at

string

Timestamp tanggal permintaan verifikasi KYC dalam format ISO

failure_reasons

array

Sebuah array objek yang berisi satu atau lebih alasan kegagalan:

  • field (string, opsional)

  • reason (string)

  • message (string)

Contoh Respons Webhook

Verifikasi Lulus

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "PASSED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "kyc_passed_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       }
   }
}

Pengajuan Ulang Diminta

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "AWAITING_RESUBMISSION",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "field": "authorized_person_selfie_document",
                   "reason": "BLURRY_IMAGE",
                   "message": "The selfie is too blurry"
               },
               {
                   "field": "business_registration_documents[0]",
                   "reason": "WRONG_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "Invalid registration document"
               },
               {
                   "field": "stakeholders[0].identification[1]",
                   "reason": "EXPIRED_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "The passport has expired"
               }

           ]
       }
   }
}

Verifikasi Gagal

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "FAILED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "reason": "FAILED_LDD",
                   "message": "Some documents are invalid or do not meet our requirements"
       	       }
           ]
       }
   }
}

Title: การยืนยัน Webhook
Content:
กำหนด URL สำหรับ webhook “Account Verification” ภายใต้ Developer Settings ใน Dashboard ของคุณ เมื่อมีการอัปเดตสถานะการยืนยันบัญชีของ sub-accounts ของคุณ เราจะส่งข้อมูลไปยัง URL ที่คุณกำหนดไว้

POST https://yourcompany.com/account_verification_webhook_url

Response Schema

Headers

Field Name

Data Type

คำอธิบาย

x-callback-token

string

Xendit unique webhook token ของคุณเพื่อตรวจสอบแหล่งที่มาของ webhook

webhook-id

string

ตัวระบุเฉพาะของ webhook แต่ละรายการเพื่อช่วยคุณจัดการ double webhooks โดยการใช้ idempotency เมื่อคุณได้รับ webhook-id เดียวกันสองครั้ง ให้ถือว่า request ที่ตามมาเป็นรายการซ้ำและปฏิเสธ webhook นั้นเพื่อป้องกัน double webhooks

Body

Field Name

Data Type

คำอธิบาย

status

string

สถานะของการยืนยัน KYC ค่าที่ใช้ได้: PASSED, AWAITING_RESUBMISSION, FAILED

kyc_passed_at

string

timestamp เมื่อสถานะ KYC เปลี่ยนเป็น PASSED ในรูปแบบ ISO format

verified_at

string

Timestamp ของการยืนยันในรูปแบบ ISO format

requested_at

string

Timestamp ของวันที่ร้องขอการยืนยัน KYC ในรูปแบบ ISO format

failure_reasons

array

array ของ objects ที่มีเหตุผลความล้มเหลวอย่างน้อยหนึ่งรายการ:

  • field (string, optional)

  • reason (string)

  • message (string)

ตัวอย่าง Webhook Response

การยืนยันผ่านแล้ว

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "PASSED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "kyc_passed_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       }
   }
}

ร้องขอให้ส่งเอกสารใหม่

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "AWAITING_RESUBMISSION",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "field": "authorized_person_selfie_document",
                   "reason": "BLURRY_IMAGE",
                   "message": "The selfie is too blurry"
               },
               {
                   "field": "business_registration_documents[0]",
                   "reason": "WRONG_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "Invalid registration document"
               },
               {
                   "field": "stakeholders[0].identification[1]",
                   "reason": "EXPIRED_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "The passport has expired"
               }

           ]
       }
   }
}

การยืนยันล้มเหลว

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "FAILED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "reason": "FAILED_LDD",
                   "message": "Some documents are invalid or do not meet our requirements"
       	       }
           ]
       }
   }
}
SeoTitle: การยืนยัน Webhook

Title: Webhook de Verificación
Content:
Configure la URL para el webhook de “Account Verification” en la sección Developer Settings de su Dashboard. Cuando haya actualizaciones sobre el estado de verificación de sus subcuentas, enviaremos los datos a la URL que usted haya establecido.

POST https://yourcompany.com/account_verification_webhook_url

Esquema de la Response

Headers

Nombre del Campo

Tipo de Dato

Descripción

x-callback-token

string

Su token webhook único de Xendit para verificar el origen del webhook

webhook-id

string

Un ID único de cada webhook para ayudarle a manejar webhooks duplicados mediante la implementación de idempotency. Cuando reciba el mismo webhook-id dos veces, trate el request subsiguiente como duplicate y rechace el webhook de acuerdo con esto para prevenir webhooks dobles

Body

Nombre del Campo

Tipo de Dato

Descripción

status

string

Estado de la verificación KYC. Valores disponibles: PASSED, AWAITING_RESUBMISSION, FAILED

kyc_passed_at

string

El timestamp de cuándo el estado KYC cambió a PASSED en formato ISO

verified_at

string

Timestamp de la verificación en formato ISO

requested_at

string

Timestamp de la fecha solicitada para la verificación KYC en formato ISO

failure_reasons

array

Un array de objects que contiene una o más razones de fallo:

  • field (string, optional)

  • reason (string)

  • message (string)

Ejemplo de Response del Webhook

Verificación Exitosa

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "PASSED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "kyc_passed_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       }
   }
}

Reenvío Solicitado

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "AWAITING_RESUBMISSION",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "field": "authorized_person_selfie_document",
                   "reason": "BLURRY_IMAGE",
                   "message": "The selfie is too blurry"
               },
               {
                   "field": "business_registration_documents[0]",
                   "reason": "WRONG_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "Invalid registration document"
               },
               {
                   "field": "stakeholders[0].identification[1]",
                   "reason": "EXPIRED_DOCUMENT",
                   "message": "The passport has expired"
               }

           ]
       }
   }
}

Verificación Fallida

{
   "event": "account.verification",
   "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
   "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
   "data": {
       "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
       "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
       "kyc": {
           "status": "FAILED",
           "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
           "failure_reasons": [
               {
                   "reason": "FAILED_LDD",
                   "message": "Some documents are invalid or do not meet our requirements"
       	       }
           ]
       }
   }
}
